AdditionalAttributes.description:
Get ready for a roar-some adventure with Kinder Joy’s NEW Jurassic World Dino Color Collection! Discover 24 Jurassic World 3D dinos in bold, vibrant colors—some even glow in the dark! Snack, play, and discover for endless prehistoric fun!

Get ready for a roar-some adventure with Kinder Joy's NEW Jurassic World Dino Color Collection! This is more than just a delicious chocolate treat; it's a dual-experience of irresistible flavor and thrilling surprise, perfect for kids and adults alike. Enclosed in the iconic Kinder egg chocolate shape, this special edition brings the excitement of the prehistoric world right into your hands.

One half of the egg delivers Kinder Joy’s signature multi-sensory chocolate taste experience. You'll savor the delightful contrast of creamy, sweet milky layers paired with crispy wafer bites filled with rich cocoa cream. It's a beloved classic flavor that makes for the perfect treat for kids and a comforting favorite for the whole family.

The other side of the egg chocolate holds an exciting surprise: a piece from the Jurassic World Dino Color Collection waiting to be discovered! Snack, play, and discover with a total of 24 Jurassic World 3D dinos to collect. These aren't just any toys—they come in bold, vibrant colors, and some even have the super-cool feature of glowing in the dark! Every Kinder Joy is a chance to unbox a new dinosaur figurine or accessory, offering endless prehistoric fun and the thrill of collecting.

Grab your Kinder Joy today and bring home the magic, the toys, and the adventure of the Jurassic World Dino Color Collection!



Two Treats in One: Enjoy the unique multi-sensory taste of creamy chocolate layers and crispy wafer bites, combined with an exciting collectible toy surprise.

Exclusive Jurassic World Collection: Collect 24 unique 3D dino toys from the NEW Jurassic World Dino Color Collection, offering a vast and exciting challenge for all collectors.

Vibrant & Glow-in-the-Dark Figures: Discover special edition toys in bold, vibrant colors, including rare figurines that glow in the dark for extra play value.

Perfect Family Fun: The ideal egg chocolate with toys to share; a beloved classic chocolate treat that guarantees a moment of fun and surprise for kids and the whole family.

*Toys may vary upon delivery

*RSPO sustainable and certified palm oil. RSPO-1106110

AdditionalAttributes.description:
SUNSILK SHAMPOO LONGER & STRONGER 350 ML

More bounce, more life! Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo helps your hair grow longer and reduces breakage so you can enjoy your hair at its longest. Enriched with biotin and sunflower seed oil, our exclusive shampoo formula gives your hair more body and bounce. Biotin for hair? Yes! It helps promote hair growth while sunflower oil helps hydrate your hair. It’s a winning combination. Today, you have more possibilities than ever before. Every second is an opportunity to live life to the fullest. And you want to be beautiful when you do that, don’t you? But life is hectic, and we need our hair to be beautiful and stay that way through all the twists and turns. That’s where Sunsilk shampoo comes in. Simple, vibrant, full of colour and scents, Sunsilk stands shoulder to shoulder with you every step of the way. In a vibrant and constantly changing world, we can celebrate each challenge with protected, repaired, strong and well-groomed hair. With decades of experience in each bottle, you can count on us for all your hair care needs. They say you only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough. Welcome to our world, providing hair care for girls who like to experiment, explore, dream and discover. Simply massage Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo onto wet hair, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily for longer and healthier-looking hair. Use together with our Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Conditioner to give your hair the body and bounce to turn heads. *Due to less breakage vs non-conditioning shampoo. With use of Sunsilk Longer & Stronger Shampoo and Conditioner.

Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo is specially designed to help you enjoy long and healthy-looking hair from root to tip

Our exclusive shampoo formula helps hair grow longer while reducing breakage so you can get the wonderful long hair you’ve always wanted

Enriched with biotin and sunflower seed oil, this shampoo gives your hair more body and bounce

Sunsilk Longer & Stronger* Shampoo is both paraben and dye free for the hair care you deserve

Sunsilk shampoo and conditioner bottles are made with 25% recycled plastic

At Sunsilk, we believe in supporting and inspiring girls everywhere by giving them hair ready for all possibilities
